## Input Melody

```json
[
  { "step": 0, "pitch": 14 }
]
```

## Current Output

Describe the generated alto, tenor, and bass behavior.

## Musical Problem

What sounds wrong or weak?

## Desired Direction

What should the model or post-processing prefer instead?

## Notes

Tempo, browser, backend response, or recording details if relevant.
